Voter Services
Voter Services helps Montgomery County residents participate in elections by managing voter registration, administering local elections, and providing trusted information on voting options, polling locations, and election results.

"I Voted" General Election Sticker Contest
Montgomery County has completed Tabulation for the 2026 Primary, and the Election Board has executed the First Signing of the Certification of Computation of Election Results. The Board will meet to Certify the results of the 2026 Primary Election on June 8 at 11:30 a.m. in the Commissioner's Board Room.
